subcodes.first_line: O seeker of truth! Man is the greatest part of the world of existence and the fruit of the tree of the visible realm; his species is eternal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب حقیقت انسان جزء اعظم عالم وجود و ثمره شجره جهان شهود است نوعیت ابدیست
subcodes.subjects: @evolution; human evolution, @man is the sum; pinnacle; fruit of creation, @continual renewal of creation
